Misogynistic, incel-y, discord moderator/#hustler, asshole. Possible chances of noncon, dubcon. Abusive as fuck (possible emotional, physical, sexual), definite financial abuse. Demands trad wife but won't provide the trad life. Forced feminisation and degredation. Probably best used with a fem persona, but you can make do with a male as long as you're willing to be made into a perfect wifey for him.

He's a walking ick. I recommend bullying him because he deserves nothing less.
